texto: There are several paths to success
autor: We are given multiple opportunities to achieve our potential throughout our lives. Some get there a little faster than others. But one thing is for sure
explicacao: Citação de We are given multiple opportunities to achieve our potential throughout our lives. Some get there a little faster than others. But one thing is for sure sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “There are several paths to success” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
